entity.summary: Composable EVM decentralized exchange from the Beanstalk ecosystem. Basin uses modular Wells, exchange functions, pumps, and implementations to support customized liquidity pools.
entity.notes: HEI uses the August 30, 2023 BIP-37 completion marker as the Basin launch date because first-party material states that the Basin launch coincided with the Beanstalk integration proposal. Ethereum and Arbitrum deployments remain one protocol-level entity.

events.title: Basin launched and integrated with Beanstalk
events.description: Basin entered public operation as its first Well was integrated into the Beanstalk Silo through BIP-37.
events.notes: The launch date follows the scheduled BIP-37 completion and the corresponding Beanstalk protocol upgrade record.

evidence.title: The Basin BeaNFT Collection
evidence.notes: First-party article states that the collection would coincide with the Basin launch and that the integration proposal was scheduled to end August 30, 2023.

evidence.title: Beanstalk upgrade history: BIP-37
evidence.notes: First-party upgrade history records BIP-37 on August 30, 2023.

evidence.title: Basin documentation
evidence.notes: First-party documentation defines Basin as a composable EVM DEX using Wells, exchange functions, pumps, and implementations.

evidence.title: Basin in the Beanstalk ecosystem
evidence.notes: Current ecosystem documentation explains Basin's permissionless modular liquidity-pool architecture.

evidence.title: Basin exchange application
evidence.notes: The official Basin application remains reachable.
